Class TaskController

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.project.TaskController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1") public class TaskController extends Object
REST endpoints for tasks. Authorization is derived from the owning project's membership (see TaskService); the acting user is resolved from the authentication.
Author:
peter haller

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    TaskController.TaskRequest
    Request body for creating/updating a task.
    static final record 
    TaskController.TaskStatusRequest
    Request body for a task status change.

    Returns the total time tracked on the task (completed spans plus the running one, live).

    Returns the individual tracked work sessions of the task (completed spans plus the running one).

  • Method Details

    • createTask

      @PostMapping("/projects/{projectId}/tasks") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> createTask(@PathVariable Long projectId, @RequestBody TaskController.TaskRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Creates a task on the given project's blackboard.

    • getTask

      @GetMapping("/tasks/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> getTask(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • updateTask

      @PatchMapping("/tasks/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> updateTask(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody TaskController.TaskRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • deleteTask

      @DeleteMapping("/tasks/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteTask(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • assignTask

      @PutMapping("/tasks/{id}/assignee/{actorId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> assignTask(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long actorId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • unassignTask

      @DeleteMapping("/tasks/{id}/assignee") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> unassignTask(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • changeStatus

      @PutMapping("/tasks/{id}/status") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> changeStatus(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody TaskController.TaskStatusRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • assignGoal

      @PutMapping("/tasks/{id}/goal/{goalId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> assignGoal(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long goalId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • unassignGoal

      @DeleteMapping("/tasks/{id}/goal") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> unassignGoal(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • startTracking

      @PostMapping("/tasks/{id}/tracking/start") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> startTracking(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • stopTracking

      @PostMapping("/tasks/{id}/tracking/stop") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> stopTracking(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • toggleTracking

      @PostMapping("/tasks/{id}/tracking/toggle") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Task> toggleTracking(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • getTracking

      @GetMapping("/tasks/{id}/tracking") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TaskService.TrackingSummary> getTracking(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Returns the total time tracked on the task (completed spans plus the running one, live).

    • getTrackingSessions

      @GetMapping("/tasks/{id}/tracking/sessions") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TaskService.WorkSession>> getTrackingSessions(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Returns the individual tracked work sessions of the task (completed spans plus the running one).
